The [[Ubrikkian Transports/Legends|Ubrikkian]] '''Talon I combat cloud car''' was an armed air vehicle designed to fill a niche between [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and lighter vehicles like the [[Storm IV Twin-Pod cloud car/Legends|Storm IV]] [[Cloud car/Legends|cloud car]]. Introduced some time before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Talon I combat cloud cars were known to be used until at least the [[New Jedi Order era|era]] of the [[New Jedi Order]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:TalonICombatCloudCar_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Talon I [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]].]]

Unlike most [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]], which generally had a flight ceiling around a few hundred meters, the Talon I had a ceiling of 100 kilometers. Using the Ubrikkian [[Servant ion/repulsorlift engine]], the Talon I could reach an airspeed of up to 1,500 km/h and could fly in environments that prohibited repulsorlift use by using only its ion thrust and aerodynamic design.

Though [[Deflector shield/Legends|unshielded]], it had good armor for a vessel of its size. A fire-linked double [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] gave the Talon I sufficient firepower to challenge many starfighters and small transports, and its low cost made it a common sight in the aerospace fleets of many planetary law enforcement and customs agencies. Proper licensing allowed private citizens and organizations to use the Talon I as well.

==History==
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1.5 ABY]] a [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] gang raided and devastated the headquarters of [[Corellian Vehicle Reclamation]] using modified Talon I cloud cars.<ref name="SWG">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Stop Rampages Through My Office}}</ref>

The [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] used Talon I cloud cars on [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]], based out of their main [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] in [[Nystao]]. When [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] first visited there, he was escorted by a pair of these craft. They were also used on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] and some [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-controlled planets, and were known to be popular in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].
